.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace minimal .gitattributes with a comprehensive, community-standard configuration for better cross-platform line ending and binary file handling.

package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to a version compatible with modern tooling and JDK 11 build environments.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.10.x) are incompatible with modern npm packages and may fail to run the updated build scripts or dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build tooling with Angular CLI and Webpack for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is deprecated and removed; the project now relies on Angular CLI which requires specific devDependencies to compile TypeScript and serve the application.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Bower package manager with npm for frontend dependency management.
package.json.why_exists: Bower is deprecated and removed; dependencies previously managed by Bower are now direct npm dependencies.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Karma/Jasmine test runner with Jest for unit testing.
package.json.why_exists: Karma configuration and dependencies are removed; the project now uses Jest which requires specific jest and @angular-builders/jest dependencies to run tests.

package.json.general_idea: Update JHipster generator version to align with the new project structure and JDK 11 compatibility.
package.json.why_exists: Older JHipster versions generate code incompatible with JDK 11 and modern Angular versions; the generator must be updated to produce valid code.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies required for the frontend application to compile.
package.json.why_exists: The application code imports Angular modules; without these dependencies, the TypeScript compiler will fail with module resolution errors.

package.json.general_idea: Add TypeScript compiler and related tooling required for frontend compilation.
package.json.why_exists: The project uses TypeScript; without the typescript dependency and compiler-cli, the build process will fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add ESLint and Prettier for code linting and formatting.
package.json.why_exists: Build scripts now include linting steps; without these dependencies, the lint commands will fail.

package.json.general_idea: Add Protractor and WebDriver Manager for end-to-end testing.
package.json.why_exists: E2E test scripts rely on Protractor; without these dependencies, e2e tests cannot be executed.

package.json.general_idea: Update project metadata to reflect the new application name and versioning scheme.
Add private flag to prevent accidental publication of the package to npm.
Add cacheDirectories configuration to optimize npm install performance.
Add jestSonar configuration for SonarQube integration with Jest reports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Yeoman/Grunt frontend build plugin with the standard JHipster frontend-maven-plugin to support Webpack.
Switch the default embedded servlet container from Tomcat to Undertow in the production profile.
Add the git-commit-id-plugin to generate build information properties.
Add the maven-war-plugin to support building WAR archives.
Add MapStruct and Hibernate JPA Metamodel Generator dependencies for IDE support.
Add Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping configuration to ignore specific plugin executions.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to clean the new static resource directory structure.
Add spring-boot-maven-plugin build-info goal to generate Actuator build properties.
Add new Maven profiles for API docs, TLS, Webpack, Dev, and E2E testing.
Remove the 'fast' profile which is no longer used in the new build structure.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster Spring Boot banner template.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Spring Boot datasource configuration to use HikariCP instead of the legacy Tomcat JDBC pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.after:
datasource:
    type: com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource
    hikari:
      poolName: Hikari

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to use JHipster's custom FixedH2Dialect for better compatibility.
Remove deprecated Hibernate naming strategy configuration.
Remove deprecated Spring Boot 1.x metrics configuration (Spark/Graphite).
src/main/resources/config/application-de.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add JHipster specific configuration properties for cache, security, and mail.
Enable Spring Boot DevTools for the development profile.
Configure Liquibase contexts for development profile.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate datasource configuration from legacy MySQL JDBC driver to HikariCP connection pool.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: The com.mysql.jdbc.jdbc2.optional.MysqlDataSource class is deprecated/removed in newer MySQL Connector/J versions and incompatible with modern Spring Boot auto-configuration which expects HikariCP.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Hibernate dialect to support MySQL 5.7+ and remove deprecated naming strategy.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect is removed in Hibernate 5.2+; org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy is removed in Hibernate 5.2+.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
jpa:
    database-platform: org.hibernate.dialect.MySQLInnoDBDialect
    hibernate:
        naming-strategy: org.hibernate.cfg.EJB3NamingStrategy
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
jpa:
  # Dialect and naming strategy removed or handled by auto-configuration

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Replace legacy EhCache region factory with standard Hibernate 5.2+ cache configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: org.hibernate.cache.ehcache.SingletonEhCacheRegionFactory is removed in Hibernate 5.2+; must use org.hibernate.cache.jcache.JCacheRegionFactory or rely on Spring Boot auto-config.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Migrate metrics configuration from Dropwizard Metrics to Micrometer.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removes support for Dropwizard Metrics (metrics.spark, metrics.graphite); Micrometer is the new standard.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.before:
metrics:
    jmx.enabled: true
    spark:
        enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.after:
management:
  metrics:
    export:
      prometheus:
        enabled: false

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Spring Mail properties to match Spring Boot 2.x property binding.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x changes mail property structure; baseUrl is no longer a standard Spring property but moved to JHipster specific config.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf configuration to remove deprecated XHTML mode.
src/main/resources/config/application-pr.why_exists: Thymeleaf 3.x (used in Spring Boot 2.x) removes XHTML mode; HTML5 is default.
